title: Per-workspace URLs - Azure Databricks
display_title: Use and configure Azure Databricks per-workspace URLs
description: Learn about Azure Databricks workspace URLs and how to start using the unique per-workspace URL.
summary: In April 2020, Azure Databricks added a new unique per-workspace URL for each workspace. This per-workspace URL has the format adb-<workspace-id>.<random-number>.azuredatabricks.net The per-workspace URL replaces the deprecated regional URL (<region>.azuredatabricks.net) to access workspaces. Important Avoid using legacy regional URLs. They may not work for new workspaces, are less reliable, and exhibit lower performance than per-workspace URLs.
classification_reason: Defines exact URL format and guidance on using per-workspace vs regional URLs; product-specific configuration/endpoint behavior.
